mapper.select: SELECT id, type, title, message, recipient_id, is_read, ref_id, ref_type, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( type, title, message, recipient_id, is_read, ref_id, ref_type, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{recipientId}, 0, #{refId}, #{refType}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
